message:
Add fallback fs operations using std/os modules

- Timer polyfill returns Timeout objects with ref/unref/hasRef methods
- fs functions now check for globalThis.__edgebox_fs_* first, then fall back to std/os
- All fs operations have std/os fallback implementations
- Fixes OpenTelemetry SDK timer.unref() call

Still debugging: std/os modules not available in bytecode execution context
